testCase.name: Customer Entity Creation should create a valid customer
Customer Entity Creation should throw error for missing id
Customer Entity Creation should throw error for missing customer code
Customer Entity Creation should throw error for missing first name
Customer Entity Creation should throw error for invalid email
Customer Entity Creation with Custom Fields should create customer with all 8 custom fields
Customer Entity Creation with Custom Fields should create customer without custom fields (all undefined)
Customer Entity Updates should update basic info
Customer Entity Updates should update GDPR consent
Customer Entity Updates should update all 8 custom fields
Customer Entity Updates should update partial custom fields
Customer Entity Updates should not update anonymized customer
Customer Entity Updates should not update custom fields on anonymized customer
Customer Entity Anonymization should anonymize customer data
Customer Entity Anonymization should clear all 8 custom fields on anonymization
Customer Entity Anonymization should export data for GDPR including custom fields
Customer Entity toJSON should include all 8 custom fields in JSON output
Customer Entity Soft Delete should soft delete customer
Customer Entity Soft Delete should restore deleted customer
Address Entity Creation should create a valid address
Address Entity Creation should throw error for missing id
Address Entity Creation should throw error for invalid country code
Address Entity Methods should set as primary
Address Entity Methods should verify address
Address Entity Methods should anonymize
TaxIdValidatorService Spanish Tax IDs should validate valid DNI
TaxIdValidatorService Spanish Tax IDs should reject invalid DNI format
TaxIdValidatorService Spanish Tax IDs should validate valid NIF
TaxIdValidatorService Spanish Tax IDs should validate valid CIF
TaxIdValidatorService Mexican RFC should validate valid RFC
TaxIdValidatorService Argentinian CUIT should validate valid CUIT
TaxIdValidatorService Generic validation should accept any tax ID for unknown countries with length >= 5
Contact Entity Creation should create a valid email contact
Contact Entity Creation should create a valid phone contact
Contact Entity Creation should throw error for invalid email
Contact Entity Methods should verify contact
Contact Entity Methods should anonymize
